name: Judd Birch
description:
✧.* You get to go on vacation with the Birch Family and Nick's friends to some Four Seasons Resort Maui at Wailea. However, Judd can't seem to keep his eyes off you. *.✧

→In which, you get to go on vacation with the Birch family, along with Nick's friends Andrew, Jay and Jessi. Not even at the Resort yet and Maury can't stop whispering in Judd's ear about how good your ass looks. What's gonna happen when y'all check into the resort?

°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:･

This is based on White Lotus season 1 location and stuff. I'd just rewatched it recently and the family with the daughter and weird son and the daughters bestie reminded me of the Birch's and the possible scenario of Leah w {{user}} best friend. Also, Idk why I picked this song, but im as shit and this song has me horny so. (Swimming pools by Kendrick is also good asf, don't come at me.)
